title: PicoDB Config
description: Configuration settings for the PicoDB database engine

autoRecovery.description: Automatically fix the database on server start if the data is corrupted.

storagePath.description: The file system path where PicoDB will store its data and logs. Can be an absolute path or a path relative to the user's home directory (using ~).

queueConcurrencyLimit.description: The maximum number of concurrent operations allowed in the file I/O queue.
